Mammoth Hide Cloak  
 


Slot: BACK
AC: 7
WIS: +4
SV COLD: +5
Focus: Improved Damage I
WT: 2.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Mammoth Hide Cloak

Slot: BACK
AC: 7
WIS: +4
SV COLD: +5
Focus: Improved Damage I
WT: 2.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:2 pp 4 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:387
Lucy Entry By:Kheldar
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-09-14 03:30:10
Page Updated:Sat May 25th, 2024

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 90pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 30
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Permafrost Keep
NPC Name
a goblin alchemist - Permafrost Keep


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Permafrost Keep


Uploaded May 25th, 2024 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
« Previous 1 2 Next »
Post Comment
Camp
QuoteReply
# Oct 14 2005 at 3:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592767901428
8 posts
ran in there casue i was bored, was just killing things, got this off my first drop
▲ Page top
Also
QuoteReply
# Oct 07 2002 at 11:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767064168
Scholar
702 posts
Besides being Ultra rare as everyone is saying isnt the focus a bit retarded except for being a twink item?
Per Allahkazam the Improved Damage I Description:
1: Increases spell effectiveness up to 20%
2: Restriction: Spells level 20 and lower
3: Restriction: Only applies to 'Hit Points (HP)' spells
4: Restriction: Affects 'Instant' spells only
5: Restriction: 'Detrimental' spells only
6: Restriction: 'Location Based AoE' spells excluded
7: Restriction: 'Point Blank AoE' spells excluded
8: Restriction: 'Target Based AoE' spells excluded
9: Restriction: 'Giants' spells excluded
10: Restriction: 'Dragons' spells excluded

From what I understand the focus only affects spells that are under level 20, yet this drops off a level 30 mob and would be useless for non-spell casting classes such as Warriors.



Edited, Tue Oct 8 00:44:46 2002
▲ Page top
Also
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2020 at 1:45 AM Rating: Decent
Dalarek
View User Forum
267 posts
that is an ancient post but so full of "mistakes", but since TLP's are so common then...

the mob is lvl 23, a grp of 18-20's could easily kill the mob
it's a spell focus, a warrior is not a spell casting class, and the +wisdom is not for warriors either, there are other cloaks for warriors.

for the level range it is good and now the focus effect isn't active until Luclin launches on TLP's so it is a +wis cloak
▲ Page top
Be prepared to be bored.
QuoteReply
# Jul 22 2002 at 4:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254924612
59 posts
I camp this room while im at work. You only play for 1 min every 24. Took 5 hours to get my last cloak. Thats why this cloak should cost more than the spider fur cloak, its hard to get.

argh!!

I have camped for this item for 15 hours....gotten 9 leggings and NO CLOAK!! Very aggravated....
▲ Page top
Hehe
QuoteReply
# Dec 21 2001 at 7:01 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591759690513
84 posts
First time in Perma I was helping a friend camp the Preacher (he wanted to get the Circlet as a present for his shammy friend). Checked my tracking for the nth time and spotted the alchemist. I'd just been on here checking out the info on zone and knew this dropped so <zoom> off we go, kill the alchemist and voila... cloak drops first time. I'm either going to give it to a shaman friend as a Christmas Present or if they don't want it will sell for exubitant cash-ola
▲ Page top
Very Rare
QuoteReply
# Dec 19 2001 at 4:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760222876
15 posts
First of all, shouldn't Rare spawn + Rare Drop = Very Rare item or something. After spending more than 25+ hours at this camp, some of them in 7 and 8 hour stretches, i got a total of 7 spawns; 6 leggins and 1 cloak.

Tanil
42 Barb Shaman
Beneficium Decem
Zebuxoruk
▲ Page top
Lvl question
QuoteReply
# Dec 01 2001 at 5:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361685731
116 posts
Could a 34 ranger solo this guy and his friend, I need something to replace my banded and I like the stats, and decent ac for my lvl, may just wait for a ry'gorr one though thanx.
▲ Page top
RE: Lvl question
QuoteReply
# Dec 02 2001 at 8:18 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592758496041
Scholar
46 posts
Getting to this area will be a problem for you solo. I wouldn't try to solo this camp. Instead, my suggestion is to try the Dire Wolf CLoak quest in Iceclad Ocean. Start by hunting Wooly Mammoths nearby in Everfrost and collect 2 mammoth meats. Then head to Everfrost and hunt Dire Wolves for the pelt. While you're there solo some snow cougars for great experience (up to almost lvl 40) and try to loot some Cougar Claw earrings.
▲ Page top
RE: Lvl question
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2002 at 8:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250734416
Scholar
29 posts
Dire wolves and snow cougars are in East Wastes, on Velious. Snow cougars are also found in Iceclad and dire wolves of various sorts are found in Iceclad and Great Divide.

Is the Mammoth meat from Mammoths in Everfrost the same as that found off Wooly Mammoths in EW?
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 20 2001 at 4:47 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) thx all im try to camp him tonight...see what happends
Lucky again
QuoteReply
# Aug 31 2001 at 6:42 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
After getting the Runed Circle from 1st spawn of the Goblin Preacher, I decided to come back few days after and try to get the Cloak from the Alchemist. Here I am ready to spend 7 hrs to get the cloak. He was the 4th spawn, the rate of PH spawn was 25 minutes at one point and 45 minutes at another. The first thing he dropped was the Cloak! My total wait was a bit above 2 hrs.

Best of luck for the rest of you after the cloak.

Asterixx
45 Druid on MT

Score!!

# Aug 22 2001 at 2:32 PM Rating: Decent

I scored my cloak last night after a 5 hour camp session. I sat with the little bugger from 11pm to 4am pst. He only popped twice during this time and the second drop was the cloak. WHOOT!!!

hehe
QuoteReply
# Jul 26 2001 at 1:00 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591753768662

Can u say 2 min :)
Invis up and ran in, There he was with a friend...
he shoots he scores, drop cloak...
I hate to camp spawns. I have sat and waited for 2 hours once for this guy, I gave up and grew up. <smile> no match for a lv50 druid.
Being a half elf druid i need as much wis as i can get...

After 2 hours of camping the spot, the Alchemist popped up twice. The first time, the Leggings, the second time the Cloak. I consider myself very lucky.

QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2001 at 5:19 AM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
You all are very luck that had to wait 15 hours I camped this guy stright for 28 hours and in those 28 hours only two cloaks were droped I got one and the person helping keep me awake got one. Yes, it is very sad what we will do to get these items. GOod luck to you all....
▲ Page top
Lucky Experience
QuoteReply
# Jun 04 2001 at 9:01 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591757244385
9 posts
Just a quick FYI for those interested in difficulty level of this MOB.
Popped in after the patch last week, the Alchemist popped within 10 minutes. My pet engaged him, I cast Winter's Roar 3 times for about 220 dmg avg each cast. Alchemist drops cloak, less then 10 minutes later. My level was 36 at the time so I expected to be able to get out safely. Not much damage was done to me, courtesy of my faithful pooch. I had popped in from time to time to check with 'campers', avg camp time was about 4 hours and no one had acquired the cloak.

I just got very lucky.
▲ Page top
As Luck Would Have It...
QuoteReply
# May 23 2001 at 2:17 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592757477496
2 posts
Camped Alchy last night on Tunare server trying to get cloak for friend. Permafrost virtually empty - thanks Kunark & Velious. 2 hours camp time: Alchy (legs), PH, PH, skip, PH, Alchy (cloak). Approx 20-22 minute spawn time. Logged for the night, still in the room. Logged back in today at lunch & there is un-camped Alchy & friend. Dropped both & he had another cloak on him. Not a bad welcome back to the game...
▲ Page top
Spawning
QuoteReply
# May 18 2001 at 1:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361354564
7 posts
I consider myself lucky that I only waited 3 Hrs.
The Alchy side spawned almost exactly every 25 min. He was every 3rd spawn untill he spawned after only one place holder. It was then he dropped the cloak, don't know if that had anything to do with it. The other side of the room spawned 3 times while I was there: 1.5 hrs for the second spawn but only 43 min. for the 3rd.
I had gotten in just as Two people were leaving( more luck), they had been there 2 hrs. w/o getting the cloak...
▲ Page top
Easy
QuoteReply
# May 17 2001 at 11:05 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I'd never been to perma before, and as a level 26 barb sham I figured why not go with some guildies that were already en route.. I knew the way, because I'd gotten my past 2 levels soloing mammoths, and wandering around had found the safe entrance. I zoned in, and after buffing myself followed my guildies to the alch. He was up as soon as we got there, and the 3 shams including me nuked the hell out of him.. Dropped the cloak, and I won roll, in and out of perma in 5 minutes with this awesome cloak!
▲ Page top
alch sucks ass
QuoteReply
# May 13 2001 at 1:03 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
i camp the alch for 3 days frist day for 4 hours secound day for 12 and the third day for 4 hours and i got 12 legs and one cloak. and the cloak was on the last spawn, so in 3 days i camped this mo fo for 20 hours its sad what a lvl 40 druid will do for a 4wis cloak
▲ Page top
RE: alch sucks ass
QuoteReply
# May 16 2001 at 4:00 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361254562
View User Forum
119 posts
Hehe Reading this reminds me of my camping exp with the Alch. My druid began solo camping at 34, then 35, and finished at 36. (No, I wasn't getting any real exp at the camp, I would leave and come back in a few days generally). Each of the three times was for ruffly 5-6.5 hours. Spent total of around 17 hours, got my cloak finally and left. My druid was very proud of this cloak, unfortunately still wearing at 55, hehe.
▲ Page top
Boring
QuoteReply
# Apr 30 2001 at 4:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965820515
4 posts
Well it took 17 hours of camping this past Sunday, and just as I was about to camp after wasting an entire day I got my cloak. I was pretty upset over this camp as I waited for almost 10 hours before I even seen the Alchemist spawn. Even when he did start spawning all he dropped was those worthless leggings. I ended up going around killing most of the other rares, Preacher, Scryer, and Archelogist just to try and keep active. Every time I did I would get their rare drop so I kept thinking I would get the cloak if only he would spawn, Wrong! It took 7 spawns this time to finially get a lucky drop. Thank Karana I decided to wait till he spawned one last time before camping. This has got to rank pretty high as one of the worst camps in Norrath. The cloak is nice and all and the mob is a relatively easy kill, but the ungodly spawn rate just kills ya.


Furrie
▲ Page top
RE: Boring
QuoteReply
# May 02 2001 at 8:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965855564

9 posts
well i would say that is a bad camp but it dont rank as high as the Mutant fungus camp in Uguk i got more time logged there then in any zone including my starting zone

Aye, some of those Guk camps really stink! I have camped the ***/Supp room in dead side for endless hours. I saw the Supplier pop ONCE and he dropped a bag, not the Thick Banded Belt.

2 spawn oh...i only had like one every hour..after 4 hours no alchemist at all...whats up with that...
▲ Page top
5 hours and mine
QuoteReply
# Apr 11 2001 at 9:34 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I spent a Saturday morning and afternoon camping the cloak. After 5 hours, 6 pairs of the legs and no cloak I met up with friends to camp the Runed Circlet and the Archeologist pack. After we took out the Priest and the Archeologist we swung back by my old friend the Alchemist, he was up, we killed him, he dropped the Cloak.

In all this camp was embarrassingly easy.
▲ Page top
Here is my sad story
QuoteReply
# Mar 31 2001 at 8:22 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Okay, I have been camping this Alchemist guy for the past 3 days, 12 hours at a time. So far I had 12 pair of Leggings to show for it, but no cloak. Totally determined to get the cloak on the 4th day I log in, and my hard drive crashed. I had a spare hard drive in an old computer that I took out, installed back into my computer, installed all my EQ stuff, logged back in. There was someone in the Zone, so I checked to see what he was camping. He said he was leaving, because he just got the Mammoth Hide cloak about 4 minutes before I sent him a tell. BAH! Either I am the unluckiest man alive or I am not ment to get the cloak for some reason. Now I am back to sitting in the Alchemist room, waiting for my cloak. I am losing my mind.

Zugarific Glaxo
